title: Unique Keys
description: Assign a unique key prop to each element in a rendered list to help React track changes.
problemStatement:
Avoid re-render warnings! Given an array of objects `const users = [{id: 1, name: "Alice"}, {id: 2, name: "Bob"}]`, render them in a list. 

**Requirement:** Ensure each `<li>` has a `key` prop set to the user's `id`.
hints: Keys help React identify which items have changed, been added, or been removed.
expectedOutput: A list of users where each list item has a unique 'key' attribute
